catalog.shortDescription: Open your guild's trade hall. Enable secure peer-to-peer asset exchange.
catalog.longDescription: The Marketplace module lets your guild run its own trading hub with on-chain escrow. Define collections, currencies, and rules for trade.
catalog.userCostsInfo: Creating, filling, or cancelling a trade requires a small amount of SOL for transaction fees. The guild may apply fees on listings; any such fees are shown when you create or fill a trade.

docs.overview: Marketplace enables secure trading inside your guild.
docs.mechanics:
Escrow smart contracts

Collection whitelisting

Token-based payments

Optional gating
docs.setup:
Add collections

Add tokens

Configure currencies

Deploy
docs.pricing:
Starter → 19 USDC/month (up to 25 mints)

Growth → 29 USDC/month (up to 100 mints, 1 custom currency)

Pro → 39 USDC/month (up to 250 mints, 2 custom currency)

Add-ons: +50 mints → 5 USDC/month, Custom currency → 5 USDC/month

activationInstructions.intro: Raise your merchant banners. Open your gates to trade.
activationInstructions.note: Configure your store before launching it. You can always change your settings later.
